summary: Zscaler Inc. headline: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Was Supposed To End Cybersecurity: It Just Triggered The Sector's Best Rally On Record

headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Up 8.3% After Launching Idira Identity Platform Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Palo Alto Networks recently launched Idira, an identity security platform that unifies discovery, control and governance for human, machine and AI identities, aiming to replace traditional privilege access management with AI-driven visibility, dynamic controls and zero standing privilege. A key feature of Idira is its ability to extend modern privilege controls to existing CyberArk customers across SaaS tiers, positioning Palo Alto Networks to address the rapidly growing volume of non-human...
